title: Wine Fest
description: Adds Wine, the entire process of obtaining it, and a structure
body:
# Wine Fest

Translated into English, Spanish and Galician

<details>
<summary>⚠️ Warning ⚠️ (Important)</summary>

In the tests I've been doing, jumping over the wine barrel full of grapes (action needed in the mod) with the [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) mod installed causes the game to crash. As I don't know why it is, I recommend installing version 0.9 which does not contain the translations well done or simply removing the Sodium mod when this process is going to be done.

</details>


<details>
<summary>All the craftings of the mod</summary>

## Bottle
![The crafting of a bottle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e8f23646780c653b078ac1a1872b85bc4c5327.jpeg)
## Cork
![The crafting of a cork](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac756030458146024c6bd42f8607007a324bc0df.jpeg)
## Closed Wine Bottle
![The crafting of a Closed Wine Bottle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35e551f8bea885347585d4a11df7332239137604.jpeg)
## Wine Vat
![The crafting of a Wine vat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e3f110e3032a6992eeaa5a5c523a19ee15f796c.jpeg)
## Wine Barrel
![The crafting of a wine barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65ed13a389decc78cb09b5526996554ad84e3037.jpeg)
</details>


## The process

### Wait to grow
![Growing grapes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/748f53edc57fcac5006204d108326a975a8daf3c.jpeg)

### Collect the grapes
![Recolecting grapes](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbWx5MWxzc3FpNzQ5amx0anRvc3ppa2xwdmN0bjNlaGFhNXZ3Mml2diZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/kvOpggOk4aiyCAXJJQ/giphy-downsized-large.gif)

### Compress the grapes
![Composting grapes](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbDJyaHZ6eDMwem9zY2ZmNTVzc2Fhcno0dG5xOGdhbDE0a2NxdXM4cCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/LmHgWd1AfEBOplqxXO/giphy-downsized-large.gif)

### Saving the wine
![Saving the wine](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNGVieW44emprMjdyajA2b3B3MnFkZ3FxMWZhanY3cDZlenVucWVtNyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/AVFlZjRiICtxMK0EI5/giphy-downsized-large.gif)
